scope: Active Greek Daniel ordinary chapters 1-12 compared against canonical Daniel text.NRSV only.
passMeaning: Active Greek Daniel ordinary chapters 1-12 are internally consistent with the trusted canonical Daniel NRSV lane.
failMeaning: Active Greek Daniel ordinary chapters 1-12 do not exactly match canonical Daniel NRSV; mismatch sample must be reviewed before any mutation or promotion.
nextAfterPass: record Greek Daniel ordinary chapters 1-12 as internally consistent
proceed to NRSV addition-source extraction for Prayer of Azariah/Song, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon
